Speaker: Frank
Text: Let me see. You're the rookie. Right?

Speaker: Frank
Text:
You have the right look.
But that's not what's important.

Speaker: Frank
Text: All that matters is luck and intuition

Speaker: Frank
Text:
First off, luck is the key.
You need to keep the accidents from happening.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
Look. See that board.
How many 'Days Without Incident' does it say?

Speaker: Frank
Text: Right. 0. Another brat like you was carried out just yesterday.

Speaker: Frank
Text: This damn Sector 7 is never quiet.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
Accidents happen every day.
Two days of peace? It's a long time.

Speaker: Frank
Text: So our goal is 7 days. Just one week.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
If you survive 7 days without an incident, you're a regular.
However…

Speaker: Frank
Text: If even a single accident happens, you're packing your bags that very day.

Speaker: Frank
Text: And we start all over again from Day 0. Got it?

Speaker: Frank
Text: Good.

Speaker: Frank
Text: First, let's grab what you need for the job.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
I need to give you a nightstick…
But there is a box piled up in front of the cabinet.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Press [E] in front of a box to pick it up, and [E] again to put it down.

Speaker: Frank
Text: It's the same for picking up or putting down other items.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
Box is clear. Now open the cabinet and grab the nightstick.
Use [E] for both.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
A nightstick is a must for a guard.
These prisoners don't understand words.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Left-click to attack. Go on, take a swing at me.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
...Better than expected.
Four or five strikes should be enough to subdue the tough ones.

Speaker: Frank
Text: But being a guard isn't just about how well you can fight.

Speaker: Frank
Text: What did I say was important along with luck?

Speaker: Frank
Text: Right, intuition.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Here, I'll give you a Bible. Take a look.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Right-click to rotate, left-click to open books.

Speaker: Frank
Text: An awl is inside, right?

Speaker: Frank
Text: This is how they hide dangerous things in plain sight.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
If you assume everything's fine just because it looks okay
—then you're (mimics throat-slitting) done.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
That's why you need sharp intuition.
It's vital to tell what's weird and what's normal.

Speaker: Frank
Text: If you're not confident, just search the cell thoroughly.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Every corner, every single brick.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Right. That's about all I can tell you.

Speaker: Frank
Text: We're short-handed, so I don't have time to teach you more.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Learn the rest on the job.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
Go talk to the Warden, Victor.
Check today's mission, and get to work.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Try to last a bit longer and prove your worth.

Speaker: Victor
Text: You hear that, don’t you?

Speaker: Victor
Text:
It seems these fools have forgotten where they are.
They’re back to their noisy antics.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
Leave them be, they'll surely take advantage of the chaos
to pull some evil stunt.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Go and beat some sense into everyone making noise.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Are they all shut up now?

Speaker: Victor
Text: Force is the only language they understand.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
You can't even maintain silence?
I have no use for you. You're out!

Speaker: Frank
Text:
I already told those bastards to shut it.
Why the hell are they making a racket again...?

Speaker: Frank
Text: I should've beaten them until they actually passed out.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
A snitch brought info.
The prisoners have hidden weapons in their cells.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
They're in here for causing trouble outside.
And now they're trying it with weapons again?

Speaker: Victor
Text: I won't have it. Not on my watch.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Search every cell thoroughly and confiscate everything.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Did you find all the weapons?

Speaker: Victor
Text: Phew, at least we won't have any weapon-related accidents today.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
A prisoner was carried out because of a weapon you missed!
You're fired!

Speaker: Frank
Text: We need to check every nook and cranny to find things.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Be careful, some might jump you while you're busy searching the room.

Speaker: Victor
Text: What the hell is wrong with this damn Sector 7?

Speaker: Victor
Text: So many of them start pulling nonsense when they step into this prison.

Speaker: Victor
Text: I’m certain some of the new arrivals today are up to no good as well.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Patrol the prison and beat down anyone you find acting out.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Did you beat some sense into all those freaks?

Speaker: Victor
Text: You're a good fighter than I expected, aren't you?

Speaker: Victor
Text:
Was it that difficult to only beat down the crazies?
You're fired!

Speaker: Mimi
Text: Oh, a new face? You're so cute.

Speaker: Mimi
Text: Won't you pick up the soap for me? Darling?

Speaker: Mimi
Text:
If you don't pick up the soap, I won't play with you.
Hehehe...

Speaker: Frank
Text:
There are bastards who pretend to be fine,
then turn on you as soon as you enter the cell.

Speaker: Frank
Text: It’d be a lot easier if they just made it obvious they were trouble.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
Is it time for your shift already?
Frank hasn't shown up yet.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
This is strange.
You, do you have any idea where Frank went?

Speaker: Victor
Text:
He definitely went down for a patrol earlier.
But he still hasn't returned.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Go down to the prison and find Frank.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Did you find Frank?

Speaker: Victor
Text:
What? Prisoners were disguised as Frank?
...They’re trying everything now.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
What? You confused a prisoner with Frank?
Are your eyes just for show? You're fired!

Speaker: Frank
Text:
Whew. My head almost flew off.
At least you've got some intuition, rookie.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Who the hell are you hitting, you moron!

Speaker: Frank
Text: Damn prisoners. Now you're even disguising yourselves as me?

Speaker: Frank
Text:
What are you talking about, you fake?
Trying to pass yourself off as me!

Speaker: Frank
Text: Just in time, rookie. Who looks like the real deal to you?

Speaker: Frank
Text: Don't be fooled, kid. Look closely and decide who's real.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
Right! I'll keep the others in check.
You go and suppress the impostors!

Speaker: Victor
Text:
Come to think of it.
It's about time for a shakedown, isn't it?

Speaker: Victor
Text:
If we don't do this regularly,
all sorts of junk starts circulating inside the prison.

Speaker: Victor
Text: It seems these inmates take me for a fool.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Go and confiscate every single item that doesn't belong in this prison!

Speaker: Victor
Text: Did you find all the contraband the prisoners were hiding?

Speaker: Victor
Text: Seriously, I have no idea where they keep bringing this stuff in from.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
If you do your job this sloppily, the inmates will think I'm a pushover!
If this is how you're going to work, just quit!

Speaker: Frank
Text: When searching cells, you’d better check the walls and floors thoroughly.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Those bastards hide their stuff in all sorts of places, I'm telling you.

Speaker: Victor
Text: They've lost their minds, absolutely lost them.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
One of the gang in Sector 7 was caught smuggling a firearm.
...And has fled.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
It's certain that one of the three is the culprit,
but since the face was covered, I can't be sure who it is.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
Go talk to them and find the real criminal.
The one who's lying must be the one.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Did you find the culprit?

Speaker: Victor
Text:
To dare bring a gun into this sacred prison.
I shall educate him personally.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
You missed the criminal! Another gun was found!
You’re incompetent. You’re fired!

Speaker: Frank
Text: So, do you know who the culprit is?

Speaker: Player
Text: The culprit is Anthony.

Speaker: Player
Text: The culprit is Richard.

Speaker: Player
Text: The culprit is Leo.

Speaker: Suspect1
Text: Suspect2 is lying right now. He's the one.

Speaker: Suspect1
Text:
Look at the stain on his pants.
It's the exact same color as gun lubricant.

Speaker: Suspect1
Text: I was in the infirmary all day yesterday.

Speaker: Suspect2
Text: Suspect3 is an honest guy.

Speaker: Suspect2
Text:
The culprit is Suspect1.
Suspect3 and I don’t touch guns. Our vision is far too poor for that.

Speaker: Suspect2
Text:
I was doing deadlifts in the yard yesterday.
The black grease on my pants is just from the equipment.

Speaker: Suspect3
Text: Suspect1 is a liar. Don't believe a word he says.

Speaker: Suspect3
Text:
Suspect2 isn't the culprit.
The lubricant used for cleaning guns is blue.

Speaker: Suspect3
Text:
I was in the laundry room yesterday.
These are the same clothes I wore then.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Good. I'll interrogate him further. Go report to the Warden.
Info: 범인 결정 시 프랭크 대사 텍스트

Speaker: Victor
Text: A rat brought some vital intel.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Apparently, the inmates in Sector 7 are prepping for a riot.

Speaker: Victor
Text: It's set for tonight—right during your shift.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
Go down there and beat them all into submission
before they can start anything!

Speaker: Victor
Text: Did you suppress all the inmates?

Speaker: Victor
Text: …Excellent work.

Speaker: Victor
Text: 7 days without an accident. I can't believe it.

Speaker: Victor
Text: You've done something truly remarkable.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
In any other place, maybe.
But here in Sector 7?
We’ve never hit a 7-day streak without an incident!

Speaker: Victor
Text: Every time you renewed that record, I was anxious yet hopeful.

Speaker: Victor
Text: To think you actually achieved a 7-day accident-free streak like this.

Speaker: Victor
Text:
I never expected to see this happen while I was in charge.
Thank you, truly.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Again, well done.

Speaker: Victor
Text: Let’s keep this streak going and keep breaking those records!

Speaker: Victor
Text:
I thought we’d finally hit the 7-day mark this time.
But I guess it’s a failure. Well, it is what it is.

Speaker: Frank
Text: Always be careful when fighting those bastards.

Speaker: Frank
Text:
Avoid their attacks while landing your own.
Easier said than done, though.
